regime_fall.current_status: U.S. and Israeli air campaign has struck approximately 9,000 Iranian targets with operations nearing completion, while Pentagon finalizes plans for potential ground operations involving 3,000-4,000 troops from the 82nd Airborne Division; the military-dominated regime under new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei continues rejecting ceasefire terms despite massive degradation of naval and missile capabilities and a nationwide internet blackout.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Pentagon finalized plans as of March 29, 2026, for potential ground operations in Iran involving 3,000-4,000 soldiers from the 82nd Airborne Division focused on the Strait of Hormuz and Kharg Island, escalating military pressure beyond the air campaign.
